Container.Name: concise
Container.Overview: Concise is a minimalist, self-hosted personal finance / net-worth tracker. One small Node.js process serves the API and web UI; all state is a single SQLite file plus validated backups, stored on the mapped /data volume. Set PUID/PGID to the user that owns your appdata share (Unraid: 99 / 100). Access over plain HTTP on your LAN requires COOKIE_SECURE=false (the template default); set it to true only when serving Concise behind an HTTPS reverse proxy.
Container.Description: Minimalist self-hosted personal finance / net-worth tracker (SQLite, no external database). Data and automatic backups live on /data — map it to your appdata share and set PUID/PGID to that share's owner.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Concise web UI and API. The container always listens on 3000 internally.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent storage: the SQLite database (concise.db) and the backups/ folder. Must be writable by PUID:PGID.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns the appdata share. Unraid default is 99 (nobody). Files in /data are created as this user.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns the appdata share. Unraid default is 100 (users).

Config.Name: COOKIE_SECURE
Config.Description: Send session cookies only over HTTPS. Leave 'false' for plain-HTTP LAN access (e.g. http://tower:3000) or login will silently fail. Set 'true' ONLY when Concise is behind an HTTPS reverse proxy.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps. Concise's own date calculations are always UTC, so this is cosmetic.

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File-creation mask for the database and backups.

Config.Name: TRUST_PROXY
Config.Description: Number of reverse-proxy hops to trust for client IPs (rate limiting, audit log). Set to 1 behind a single proxy; 0 when exposed directly.

Config.Name: TRUSTED_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Comma-separated extra origins the CSRF check should trust (e.g. https://money.example.com). Only needed if the UI is served from a different origin than the API.

Config.Name: API_RATE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Max API requests per client IP per minute.

Config.Name: LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Max login attempts per client IP per 15 minutes.

Config.Name: PRICE_PROVIDER
Config.Description: 'real' fetches live quotes from Yahoo Finance (no API key). 'simulated' uses a deterministic offline simulation (for air-gapped use; prices will not match the market).

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity (structured JSON to the container log): fatal, error, warn, info, debug, trace, silent.

Config.Name: SEED_ON_START
Config.Description: Set to 1 to (re)create the demo account (demo / demo) on every start. Leave 0 for real use.
